introSection: Dingo Racer is a steel spinning roller coaster located at Aussie World in Sunshine Coast, Queensland, Australia.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
A $763,000 investment from the Queensland Government's Growing Tourism Infrastructure Fund contributed to the installation of the coaster.

It opened on 30 June 2022.

fullText:
Dingo Racer is a steel spinning roller coaster located at Aussie World in Sunshine Coast, Queensland, Australia.

A $763,000 investment from the Queensland Government's Growing Tourism Infrastructure Fund contributed to the installation of the coaster.

It opened on 30 June 2022.
